name: Baked Chicken a La Joe Dogs
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts (remove skin but leave bones in)
4 New red potatoes cut into 1/4-inch rounds (leave skin on)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts, facing bone down, in a 14x10-inch baking pan or dish.
2. Sprinkle pepper, chopped garlic cloves and oregano over meaty tops.
3. Arrange potatoes and onions in the pan around the chicken.
4. Sprinkle garlic salt and Accent (optional) over top of everything.
5. Pour one cup of chicken stock over the chicken breasts.
6. Cover the pan or dish and cook in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes.
7. Remove the cover and pour the other cup of chicken stock, as well as a can of sweet peas (including juice), over the concoction.
8. Bake, uncovered, for another 20-25 minutes.
9. Serve with rice and Dewar's White Label scotch.
